blocks.text: Calm before the storm — Glimt's historic CL night arrives Wednesday
🚴 Tirreno-Adriatico 12:40 — Leknessund and Wærenskjold open Norway's spring classics campaign across seven Italian stages

blocks.label: ⚽ Tuesday — CL Round of 16 first legs

blocks.text: Wednesday is Norway's biggest club football night ever: Bodø/Glimt host Sporting CP at Aspmyra at 21:00 — same slot as Man City vs Real Madrid at the Bernabéu. Historic company for Glimt.
